reviews.review_title: LETHAL PARADOX 2 IS BACK TY UNIVERSAL!!
reviews.review_description: I was the one who commented on one of your shorts to bring Lethal Paradox 2 back, and when I saw this, I was blown away of how this game came back after a year! Again, thank you Universal this brought a smile to my face and I will be looking forward to all of your games keep working on your projects and Keep listening to your fans like me! 😁

“Lethal Ape 3” is a popular fan-made spin-off inspired by Gorilla Tag, and it’s considered by some to be one of the best Gorilla Tag fan games for a few reasons:
	1.	Improved Graphics and Environments: Many fans feel that Lethal Ape 3 has taken the basic graphical elements of Gorilla Tag and elevated them, with more detailed environments, better textures, and atmospheric effects that make the game feel more immersive.
	2.	Expanded Mechanics and Gameplay: While Gorilla Tag is known for its simple, physics-based movement and tagging mechanics, Lethal Ape 3 introduces more complex features. These may include different game modes, additional movement options, power-ups, or new abilities that diversify the gameplay and offer new challenges.
	3.	Enhanced Multiplayer Features: Lethal Ape 3 often supports more robust multiplayer options, like matchmaking, private lobbies, or friend lists, making it easier for friends to join up and play together or for players to find competitive matches.
	4.	Frequent Updates and Community Engagement: Many fan games tend to stagnate, but Lethal Ape 3 often has frequent updates and active developers who engage with the player base, listen to feedback, and incorporate changes that players want to see, helping to build a loyal community around it.
	5.	Unique Aesthetic and Tone: While Gorilla Tag has a fun, simple, and light-hearted vibe, Lethal Ape 3 leans into a darker, perhaps edgier style, which appeals to players looking for a different atmosphere. This tonal shift can make the game feel fresh and intense.
	6.	Customization Options: Lethal Ape 3 might also provide more cosmetic customization for players to express themselves in unique ways, adding to the enjoyment and giving a sense of progression and personalization.

These factors contribute to Lethal Ape 3 being seen as a standout Gorilla Tag fangame, especially for players seeking more depth, variety, and intensity.
